import requests


def download_report(url: str) -> bytes:
    response = requests.get(url)
    body = response.content
    if response.status_code != 200:
        raise RuntimeError(f"Failed to download: {response.status_code}")
    return body


def fetch_export(url: str) -> str:
    resp = requests.get(url)
    data = resp.text
    resp.raise_for_status()
    return data


def load_dataset(url: str) -> dict:
    response = requests.get(url)
    payload = response.json()
    if response.status_code >= 400:
        raise ValueError(f"Server error: {response.status_code}")
    return payload
